title: ai-toolkit project configuration
description: Project-level configuration for ai-toolkit with optional inheritance via extends.

extends.description: Base config to inherit from. npm package name (@scope/pkg or @scope/pkg@version), git URL (git+https://...), or local path (./path or ../path).

name.description: Config identity (required for base configs published as npm packages).

profile.description: Installation profile controlling which modules are installed.

agents.description: Agent configuration — enable, disable, or add custom agents.

enabled.description: Agent names to enable (merged with base).

disabled.description: Agent names to disable (blocked if base enforces them).

custom.description: Paths to custom agent .md files (relative to config root).

inject.description: Paths to rule .md files to inject into CLAUDE.md.

remove.description: Rule names to remove from base config.

constitution.description: Constitution amendments. Articles I-VI are immutable. Base articles are immutable. Projects can only ADD new articles (7+).

article.description: Article number. 1-5 are reserved (immutable). Base articles are also immutable.

enforce.description: Non-overridable constraints (base configs only). Projects inheriting this config must comply.

minHookProfile.description: Minimum hook profile — projects cannot go below this.

requiredPlugins.description: Plugins that must be installed in all inheriting projects.

forbidOverride.description: Components that cannot be overridden by inheriting projects.

requiredAgents.description: Agents that must be enabled in all inheriting projects.

override.description: Must be true to confirm intentional override.

justification.description: Explanation for why this override is needed (min 20 chars).

overrides.description: Explicit overrides of base config components. Each override requires override:true + justification.
